title: CI: verify the path-filter conditions are working as expected
body:
The ci workflow uses skips based on source changes which is implemented using the path-filter action.

Test that the skips work as designed (like they were under cirrus)

For example a change only in test/system should only trigger the system tests (and the build tests which always run)

A change to the Readme should only run the basic build/validate tasks and nothing else, so no real tests, int, sys, etc...

machine tests should onyl be trigger when machine code changes

Ensure this all works and never skips tests when they must run normally so we do not introduce regressions.

comments.body:
FWIW, based on the recent PRs I have seen so far it seems to work.

https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/pull/28839
https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/pull/28836

machine tests also seem to be skipped by default unless machine code gets changed

maybe check some of the smaller tests, i.e. only a change in test/apiv2
